project.description: Enables "Explore without Login" functionality. This configures the frontend, PSAMA, and Wildfly to allow unauthenticated users to use the explorer page with a limited feature set.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Set to true to enable Explore without Login. Set to false to disable it.

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: CONFIRM_PUBLIC_DATA
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: I know what I am doing and accept that all of my data will be publicly available

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
if [ "$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS" = "true" ] && [ "$CONFIRM_PUBLIC_DATA" != "true" ]; then echo "ERROR: You must check 'I know what I am doing and accept that all of my data will be publicly available' to proceed." exit 1 fi
CONFIG_DIR="/usr/local/docker-config"
echo "============================================" echo "Enable Explore Without Login: $ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS" echo "============================================"
## ## 1. Frontend Configuration (httpd.env) ## echo "" echo "--- Configuring Frontend (httpd.env) ---"
HTTPD_ENV="$CONFIG_DIR/httpd/httpd.env"
if [ ! -f "$HTTPD_ENV" ]; then echo "ERROR: $HTTPD_ENV not found." exit 1 fi
# Update or add VITE_OPEN if grep -q "^VITE_OPEN=" "$HTTPD_ENV"; then sed -i "s/^VITE_OPEN=.*/VITE_OPEN=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS/" "$HTTPD_ENV" else echo "VITE_OPEN=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS" >> "$HTTPD_ENV" fi
# Update or add VITE_OPEN_EXPLORER if grep -q "^VITE_OPEN_EXPLORER=" "$HTTPD_ENV"; then sed -i "s/^VITE_OPEN_EXPLORER=.*/VITE_OPEN_EXPLORER=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS/" "$HTTPD_ENV" else echo "VITE_OPEN_EXPLORER=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS" >> "$HTTPD_ENV" fi
# Set VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS to match VITE_RESOURCE_HPDS when enabling if [ "$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS" = "true" ]; then AUTH_HPDS=$(grep "^VITE_RESOURCE_HPDS=" "$HTTPD_ENV" | cut -d'=' -f2) if [ -n "$AUTH_HPDS" ]; then if grep -q "^VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=" "$HTTPD_ENV"; then sed -i "s/^VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=.*/VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=$AUTH_HPDS/" "$HTTPD_ENV" else echo "VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=$AUTH_HPDS" >> "$HTTPD_ENV" fi echo "Set VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=$AUTH_HPDS"
# Update visualization resource if it exists VIZ_RESOURCE=$(grep "^VITE_RESOURCE_VIZ=" "$HTTPD_ENV" | cut -d'=' -f2) if [ -n "$VIZ_RESOURCE" ]; then echo "Visualization resource found: $VIZ_RESOURCE (HPDS UUIDs should match)" fi else echo "WARNING: VITE_RESOURCE_HPDS not found in $HTTPD_ENV. VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS must be set manually." fi else # Clear the open HPDS resource when disabling if grep -q "^VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=" "$HTTPD_ENV"; then sed -i "s/^VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=.*/VITE_RESOURCE_OPEN_HPDS=/" "$HTTPD_ENV" fi fi
echo "Frontend configuration updated."
## ## 2. PSAMA Configuration (psama.env) ## echo "" echo "--- Configuring PSAMA (psama.env) ---"
PSAMA_ENV="$CONFIG_DIR/psama/psama.env"
if [ ! -f "$PSAMA_ENV" ]; then echo "ERROR: $PSAMA_ENV not found." exit 1 fi
sed -i "s/^OPEN_IDP_PROVIDER_IS_ENABLED=.*/OPEN_IDP_PROVIDER_IS_ENABLED=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS/" "$PSAMA_ENV" echo "Set OPEN_IDP_PROVIDER_IS_ENABLED=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS"
## ## 3. Wildfly Configuration (standalone.xml) ## echo "" echo "--- Configuring Wildfly (standalone.xml) ---"
STANDALONE_XML="$CONFIG_DIR/wildfly/standalone.xml"
if [ ! -f "$STANDALONE_XML" ]; then echo "ERROR: $STANDALONE_XML not found." exit 1 fi
sed -i "s|<simple name=\"java:global/openAccessEnabled\" value=\"[^\"]*\"|<simple name=\"java:global/openAccessEnabled\" value=\"$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS\"|" "$STANDALONE_XML" echo "Set openAccessEnabled=$ENABLE_OPEN_ACCESS"
echo "" echo "============================================" echo "Configuration complete." echo "Run 'Start PIC-SURE' to apply changes." echo "============================================"
